# Get parameters from CTL db
### db_notebookname & NotebookPath: **override_bronze**

#Get Parameters from controldb
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, to_date, date_format
import json
import sys
import logging
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "override_bronze"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

#Get load meta from controldb
db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

#Join cfg_notebook and cfg_notebook_parameter tables to retrieve source & target meta from controldb

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname) 

#display(df2)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container 

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Bronze_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Bronze_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']
#### Configure logging

# Configure logging
def setup_logger(notebook_name):
    # Get or create logger
    logger = logging.getLogger(notebook_name)
    logger.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)  # Set to DEBUG for detailed logs

    # Remove any existing handlers to prevent duplicates
    logger.handlers.clear()

    # Prevent propagation to root logger (avoids default handlers)
    logger.propagate = False

    # Create console handler
    console_handler = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)
    console_handler.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)

    # Define log format (only the formatted line will appear)
    log_format = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
    console_handler.setFormatter(log_format)

    # Add handler to logger
    logger.addHandler(console_handler)
    
    return logger
# Set up logger for this notebook
logger = setup_logger("override_bronze")
# Table Creation: START

#UTILS: Set table name

#tablename="fuel_override"

#Set table name
db_tablename="fuel_override"
raw_tablename="fuel_override/s43_fuel_override"

#Create fuel_override: Bronze Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    Id BIGINT,
    InvoiceDate STRING,
    TransactionDate STRING,
    SupplyPoint STRING,
    Product STRING,
    Quantity STRING,
    TransactionNumber STRING,
    SiteCode STRING,
    UsageCategory STRING,
    Supplier STRING,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCOps INT,
    CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    HashKey STRING,
    HashDiff STRING
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

#UTILS: Set table name

#Set table name
db_tablename="electricity_override"
raw_tablename="electricity_override/s44_electricity_override"

#Create electricity_override: Bronze Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(   
    Id BIGINT,
    SiteCode STRING,
    LocationIdentifier STRING,
    InvoiceNumber STRING,
    InvoiceDate STRING,
    PreviousReadDate STRING,
    CurrentReadDate STRING,
    SupplyAddress STRING,
    MeterReadingType STRING,
    ChargeType STRING,
    QuantityKWH STRING,
    CleanEnergySubscription STRING,
    Supplier STRING,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCOps INT,
    CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    HashKey STRING,
    HashDiff STRING
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
# Table Creation: END
# Table: **fuel_override**: START

#Set table name
db_tablename="fuel_override"
raw_tablename="fuel_override/s43_fuel_override"

try:
    raw_df = spark.read.format("parquet").load(f'abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}/{raw_tablename}/')
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("InvoiceDate", date_format(to_date(col("InvoiceDate"), "d/M/yyyy"), "dd/MM/yyyy"))
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("TransactionDate", date_format(to_date(col("TransactionDate"), "d/M/yyyy"), "dd/MM/yyyy"))
    #display(raw_df)

except Exception as e:
    logger.error(f"Error - Reading parquet file: 'abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}/{raw_tablename}/: {str(e)}")
    raise

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format, to_date, when, substring
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace, row_number
from pyspark.sql.types import DecimalType
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

# Add CDC columns
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Id", regexp_replace("TransactionDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), "TransactionNumber" ), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", regexp_replace("InvoiceDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), "SupplyPoint", "Product" ,"Quantity", "SiteCode", "UsageCategory", "Supplier"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#display(raw_df)

# Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT ( Id, InvoiceDate, TransactionDate, SupplyPoint, Product, Quantity, TransactionNumber, SiteCode, UsageCategory, Supplier, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Id, s.InvoiceDate, s.TransactionDate, s.SupplyPoint, s.Product, s.Quantity, s.TransactionNumber, s.SiteCode, s.UsageCategory, s.Supplier, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT ( Id, InvoiceDate, TransactionDate, SupplyPoint, Product, Quantity, TransactionNumber, SiteCode, UsageCategory, Supplier, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Id, s.InvoiceDate, s.TransactionDate, s.SupplyPoint, s.Product, s.Quantity, s.TransactionNumber, s.SiteCode, s.UsageCategory, s.Supplier, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)

# Update FileOverrideFlag for marano_bronze.marano_fuel_transactions to override the ingested file
# Determine the key for the fuel override table records inserted 
marano_override_key_df = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT distinct 
    t.SourceFileID, t.CDCLoadDate, t.InvoiceDate
FROM
    marano_bronze.marano_fuel_transactions t
join
    temp_table s on date_format(to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') = date_format(to_date(s.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
WHERE 
    Supplier = 'marano'
""")
marano_override_key_df.createOrReplaceTempView("marano_override_key")

# Update marano_bronze.marano_fuel_transactions to disable records that match the override key
# Records from fuel override will move to silver, instead of the equivalent records from marano_bronze.marano_fuel_transactions
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO marano_bronze.marano_fuel_transactions t
    USING marano_override_key s
    ON t.SourceFileID = s.SourceFileID and t.CDCLoadDate = s.CDCLoadDate and date_format(to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') = date_format(to_date(s.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
    WHEN MATCHED THEN
      UPDATE SET t.FileOverrideFlag = True    
""")

# Update FileOverrideFlag for marano_bronze.marano_bulk_fuel_transactions to override the ingested file
# Determine the key for the fuel override table records inserted 
marano_bulk_override_key_df = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT distinct 
    t.SourceFileID, t.CDCLoadDate, t.InvoiceDate
FROM
    marano_bronze.marano_bulk_fuel_transactions t
join
    temp_table s on date_format(to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') = date_format(to_date(s.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
WHERE 
    Supplier = 'marano_bulk'
""")
marano_bulk_override_key_df.createOrReplaceTempView("marano_bulk_override_key")

# Update marano_bronze.marano_bulk_fuel_transactions to disable records that match the override key
# Records from fuel override will move to silver, instead of the equivalent records from marano_bronze.marano_bulk_fuel_transactions
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO marano_bronze.marano_bulk_fuel_transactions t
    USING marano_bulk_override_key s
    ON t.SourceFileID = s.SourceFileID and t.CDCLoadDate = s.CDCLoadDate and date_format(to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') = date_format(to_date(s.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
    WHEN MATCHED THEN
      UPDATE SET t.FileOverrideFlag = True    
""")

#Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Bronze_Update = Bronze_Update_Post - Bronze_Update_Pre
Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre) + Bronze_Update
Bronze_Delete = Bronze_Delete_Post - Bronze_Delete_Pre
Bronze_ActiveRows = Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post 
Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create dataframe to insert log to controldb
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Bronze_LoadDate,Bronze_Insert,Bronze_Update,Bronze_Delete,Bronze_ActiveRows,Bronze_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#display(df_log)

#Write df_log to logging table in controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
#  Table: **fuel_override**: END
# Table: **electricity_override**: START

#Set table name
db_tablename="electricity_override"
raw_tablename="electricity_override/s44_electricity_override"

try: 
    # load parquet file as dataframe
    raw_df = spark.read.format("parquet").load(f'abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}/{raw_tablename}/')
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("InvoiceDate", date_format(to_date(col("InvoiceDate"), "d/M/yyyy"), "dd/MM/yyyy"))
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CurrentReadDate", date_format(to_date(col("CurrentReadDate"), "d/M/yyyy"), "dd/MM/yyyy"))
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("PreviousReadDate", date_format(to_date(col("PreviousReadDate"), "d/M/yyyy"), "dd/MM/yyyy"))
    #display(raw_df)

except Exception as e:
    logger.error(f"Error - Reading parquet file: 'abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}/{raw_tablename}/: {str(e)}")
    raise

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format, to_date, when, substring
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace, row_number
from pyspark.sql.types import DecimalType
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

# Add CDC columns
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Id", "SiteCode", "LocationIdentifier", "InvoiceNumber", regexp_replace("InvoiceDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), regexp_replace("CurrentReadDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), regexp_replace("PreviousReadDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), "Supplier"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||" , regexp_replace("SupplyAddress", "-|[/.:]", ""), "MeterReadingType" , "ChargeType", "QuantityKWH", "CleanEnergySubscription"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))
#display(raw_df)

# Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT ( Id, SiteCode, LocationIdentifier, InvoiceNumber, InvoiceDate, PreviousReadDate, CurrentReadDate, SupplyAddress, MeterReadingType, ChargeType, QuantityKWH, CleanEnergySubscription, Supplier, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Id, s.SiteCode, s.LocationIdentifier, s.InvoiceNumber, s.InvoiceDate, s.PreviousReadDate, s.CurrentReadDate, s.SupplyAddress, s.MeterReadingType, s.ChargeType, s.QuantityKWH, s.CleanEnergySubscription, s.Supplier, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT ( Id, SiteCode, LocationIdentifier, InvoiceNumber, InvoiceDate, PreviousReadDate, CurrentReadDate, SupplyAddress, MeterReadingType, ChargeType, QuantityKWH, CleanEnergySubscription, Supplier, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Id, s.SiteCode, s.LocationIdentifier, s.InvoiceNumber, s.InvoiceDate, s.PreviousReadDate, s.CurrentReadDate, s.SupplyAddress, s.MeterReadingType, s.ChargeType, s.QuantityKWH, s.CleanEnergySubscription, s.Supplier, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)

# Update FileOverrideFlag for origin_bronze to override the ingested file
# Determine the key for the electricity override table records inserted 
origin_invoice_override_key_df = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT distinct 
     t.SourceFileID, t.CDCLoadDate, t.InvoiceDate, t.InvoiceNumber
FROM
    origin_bronze.origin_invoice_details t
join
    temp_table s ON date_format(to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'dd MMM yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') = date_format(to_date(s.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') and t.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
WHERE 
    Supplier = 'origin'
""")
origin_invoice_override_key_df.createOrReplaceTempView("origin_invoice_override_key")
# Update origin_bronze tables to disable records that match the override key
# Records from electricity override will move to silver, instead of the equivalent records from origin_bronze
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO origin_bronze.origin_invoice_details t
    USING origin_invoice_override_key s
    ON t.SourceFileID = s.SourceFileID and t.CDCLoadDate = s.CDCLoadDate and t.InvoiceDate = s.InvoiceDate and t.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
    WHEN MATCHED THEN
      UPDATE SET t.FileOverrideFlag = True    
""")


# Determine the key for the electricity override table records inserted 
origin_charges_override_key_df = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT distinct 
      t.SourceFileID, t.CDCLoadDate, t.InvoiceDate, t.InvoiceNumber
FROM
    origin_bronze.origin_charge_details t
join
    temp_table s ON date_format(to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'dd MMM yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') = date_format(to_date(s.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') and t.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
WHERE 
    Supplier = 'origin'
""")
origin_charges_override_key_df.createOrReplaceTempView("origin_charges_override_key")
# Update origin_bronze tables to disable records that match the override key
# Records from electricity override will move to silver, instead of the equivalent records from origin_bronze
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO origin_bronze.origin_charge_details t
    USING origin_charges_override_key s
    ON t.SourceFileID = s.SourceFileID and t.CDCLoadDate = s.CDCLoadDate and t.InvoiceDate = s.InvoiceDate and t.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
    WHEN MATCHED THEN
      UPDATE SET t.FileOverrideFlag = True    
""")


# Determine the key for the electricity override table records inserted 
origin_meter_override_key_df = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT distinct 
      t.SourceFileID, t.CDCLoadDate, t.InvoiceDate, t.InvoiceNumber
FROM
    origin_bronze.origin_meter_details t
join
    temp_table s ON date_format(to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'dd MMM yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') = date_format(to_date(s.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') and t.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
WHERE 
    Supplier = 'origin'
""")
origin_meter_override_key_df.createOrReplaceTempView("origin_meter_override_key")
# Update origin_bronze tables to disable records that match the override key
# Records from electricity override will move to silver, instead of the equivalent records from origin_bronze
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO origin_bronze.origin_meter_details t
    USING origin_meter_override_key s
    ON t.SourceFileID = s.SourceFileID and t.CDCLoadDate = s.CDCLoadDate and t.InvoiceDate = s.InvoiceDate and t.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
    WHEN MATCHED THEN
      UPDATE SET t.FileOverrideFlag = True    
""")

# Update FileOverrideFlag for ergon_bronze to override the ingested file
# Determine the key for the electricity override table records inserted 
ergon_invoice_override_key_df = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT distinct 
     t.SourceFileID, t.CDCLoadDate, t.InvoiceDate, t.InvoiceNumber
FROM
    ergon_bronze.ergon_invoice_details t
join
    temp_table s ON (CASE
            WHEN to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'dd MMM yyyy') IS NOT NULL THEN date_format(to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'dd MMM yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy')
            WHEN to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'dd/MM/yy') IS NOT NULL THEN date_format(to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'dd/MM/yy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy')
        END = date_format(to_date(s.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') and t.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber) AND t.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber and t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
WHERE 
    Supplier = 'ergon'
""")
ergon_invoice_override_key_df.createOrReplaceTempView("ergon_invoice_override_key")
# Update ergon_bronze tables to disable records that match the override key
# Records from electricity override will move to silver, instead of the equivalent records from ergon_bronze
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO ergon_bronze.ergon_invoice_details t
    USING ergon_invoice_override_key s
    ON t.SourceFileID = s.SourceFileID and t.CDCLoadDate = s.CDCLoadDate and t.InvoiceDate = s.InvoiceDate and t.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
    WHEN MATCHED THEN
      UPDATE SET t.FileOverrideFlag = True
""")


# Determine the key for the electricity override table records inserted 
ergon_charges_override_key_df = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT distinct 
     t.SourceFileID, t.CDCLoadDate, t.InvoiceDate, t.InvoiceNumber
FROM
    ergon_bronze.ergon_charge_details t
join
    temp_table s ON (CASE
            WHEN to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'dd MMM yyyy') IS NOT NULL THEN date_format(to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'dd MMM yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy')
            WHEN to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'dd/MM/yy') IS NOT NULL THEN date_format(to_date(t.InvoiceDate, 'dd/MM/yy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy')
        END = date_format(to_date(s.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') and t.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber) AND t.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber and t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
WHERE 
    Supplier = 'ergon'
""")
ergon_charges_override_key_df.createOrReplaceTempView("ergon_charges_override_key")
# Update ergon_bronze tables to disable records that match the override key
# Records from electricity override will move to silver, instead of the equivalent records from ergon_bronze
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO ergon_bronze.ergon_charge_details t
    USING ergon_charges_override_key s
    ON t.SourceFileID = s.SourceFileID and t.CDCLoadDate = s.CDCLoadDate and t.InvoiceDate = s.InvoiceDate and t.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
    WHEN MATCHED THEN
      UPDATE SET t.FileOverrideFlag = True
""")

# Update FileOverrideFlag for cbre_bronze to override the ingested file
# Determine the key for the electricity override table records inserted 
cbre_override_key_df = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT distinct 
     t.SourceFileID, t.CDCLoadDate, t.LocationIdentifier
FROM
    cbre_bronze.cbre_meter_details t
join
    temp_table s on s.LocationIdentifier = t.LocationIdentifier and date_format(to_date(s.InvoiceDate, 'd/MM/yyyy'), 'dd/MM/yyyy') = t.CurrentReadDate AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
WHERE 
    Supplier = 'cbre'
""")
cbre_override_key_df.createOrReplaceTempView("cbre_override_key")

# Update cbre_bronze table to disable records that match the override key
# Records from electricity override will move to silver, instead of the equivalent records from cbre_bronze
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO cbre_bronze.cbre_meter_details t
    USING cbre_override_key s
    ON t.SourceFileID = s.SourceFileID and t.CDCLoadDate = s.CDCLoadDate and t.LocationIdentifier = s.LocationIdentifier AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
    WHEN MATCHED THEN
      UPDATE SET t.FileOverrideFlag = True    
""")

#Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Bronze_Update = Bronze_Update_Post - Bronze_Update_Pre
Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre) + Bronze_Update
Bronze_Delete = Bronze_Delete_Post - Bronze_Delete_Pre
Bronze_ActiveRows = Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post 
Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create dataframe to insert log to controldb
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Bronze_LoadDate,Bronze_Insert,Bronze_Update,Bronze_Delete,Bronze_ActiveRows,Bronze_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#display(df_log)

#Write df_log to logging table in controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
